title: styracaceae
intro: Styracaceae is a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the storax or sweet gum family. This family includes about 11 genera of trees and shrubs native to East Asia and Southeast Asia. The members of Styracaceae are characterized by their star-shaped flowers, often with a sweet fragrance, and their bark, which is valued for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The storax tree, Styrax japonica, is a well-known example of a plant belonging to this family.
